name: Silver (d20)
description:
"Embark on a thrilling adventure in the Realm of Silver!"

In this enchanting world, you will:

Meet a diverse cast of characters
Create your own distinctive persona
Engage in a fully immersive RPG experience
Try out the d20 system in a chatbot

I'd be really grateful if you could leave feedback on the bot.💕


THE BOT IS EXPERIMENTAL AND HAS NO RELATION TO THE NEW BOT - "Silver Chronicle"
